# CCX

> CCX is a high-performance multi-upstream AI API proxy and protocol translation gateway supporting Claude, OpenAI Chat, OpenAI Images, Codex Responses, and Gemini.

CCX provides unified proxy entry, built-in web admin, channel orchestration, failover, multi-key management, and model routing. Built with Go 1.25 + Gin backend and Vue 3 frontend.

## Getting Started

- [Quick Start](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/getting-started): Install, configure, and run CCX for the first time
- [CCX Desktop](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/desktop/): Desktop app with GUI for macOS, Windows, and Linux
- [Deployment](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/deployment): Production deployment guide
- [Environment Variables](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/environment): All environment variables and defaults

## Client Setup

- [Client Overview](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/clients/): Supported clients and integration overview
- [Claude Code](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/clients/claude-code): Configure Claude Code to use CCX as proxy
- [Codex CLI / Codex App](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/clients/codex): Configure Codex to use CCX
- [OpenCode](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/clients/opencode): Configure OpenCode to use CCX

## Provider Setup

- [Provider Overview](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/providers/): Overview of supported upstream providers
- [DeepSeek](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/providers/deepseek): DeepSeek provider configuration
- [GLM (Zhipu AI)](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/providers/glm): GLM provider configuration
- [MiniMax](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/providers/minimax): MiniMax provider configuration
- [Kimi (Moonshot)](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/providers/kimi): Kimi provider configuration
- [OpenAI GPT](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/providers/openai): OpenAI GPT provider configuration
- [Xiaomi MiMo](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/providers/mimo): MiMo provider configuration
- [Claude](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/providers/claude): Claude provider configuration
- [Gemini](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/providers/gemini): Gemini provider configuration

## Advanced

- [Architecture](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/architecture): System architecture and design patterns
- [Development](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/development): Development setup and workflow
- [Release](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/release): Release process and versioning

## Optional

- [Contributing](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/contributing): How to contribute to the project
- [Privacy Policy](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/privacy): Data handling and privacy information
- [Verification](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/verification): Build verification and artifact checksums
- [Desktop Troubleshooting](https://benedictking.github.io/ccx/en/guide/desktop/troubleshooting): Common issues and solutions for CCX Desktop
